title: Iran war causing staycation spike - holiday firms
summary: Rising geopolitical tensions from the Iran conflict are driving holiday cancellations, with travelers citing increased costs and uncertainty. Holiday firms report a shift toward staycations as consumers avoid international travel destinations.
content: One man says he cancelled his holiday to Spain due to the rising costs and uncertainty.

zh.title: 伊朗战争引发居家度假热潮 - 假期公司
zh.summary: 伊朗冲突导致的地缘政治紧张局势正在推动度假取消，旅行者因成本增加和不确定性而选择居家度假。度假公司报告消费者避开国际旅游目的地的趋势。
